prompt:
A developer’s desk with a laptop open to a stylized DSPACE settings or integrations screen on one side and a GitHub-style logo panel on the other, connected by a glowing link icon or animated-looking line between them. The UI uses colored blocks and recognizable iconography but no readable text. A notification-style badge appears near the link icon to show that the DSPACE account has been successfully connected to GitHub for syncing and submissions.

Near-future solarpunk workspace aesthetic with soft, indirect lighting, a few sticky notes, and a plant or two. Photorealistic 512×512 rendering, no brand logos that exactly match real trademarks—just suggestive iconography—and no legible text. No people are in frame; the focus is on the linked UIs representing account connection.
